heading: Cadets: degree and commission on graduation
label: 7453 Cadets: degree and commission on graduation
notes: Historical and Revision Notes1956ActRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4353(a)4353(b)10:486a (less last sentence).10:506c(f) (1st sentence, less last 43 words).(less last sentence); restated (less last sentence); restated ; restated (less last sentence), .May 25, 1933, ch. 37Aug. 9, 1946, ch. 932Aug. 4, 1949, ch. 393, § 13Aug. 18, 1949, ch. 47663 Stat. 615(1st sentence, less last 43 words), .Aug. 7, 1947, ch. 512, § 506(f)61 Stat. 892In subsection (a), the last 27 words are substituted for 10:486a (last sentence). The words “rules and” and “from and after the date of the accrediting of said Academy” are omitted as surplusage. The word “conditions” is substituted for the words “rules and regulations”.In subsection (b), the words “except ” are inserted to reflect the authority to appoint graduates of one service academy as officers of another service.section 541 of this title

1958ActRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4353(b)10 App.:506c–4(c) (1st sentence).(1st sentence), .July 20, 1956, ch. 646, § 103(c)70 Stat. 583It is unnecessary to include a reference to section 541, since that section does not derogate from the authority granted in this section.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4353 of this title1980—Subsec. (b). inserted “under ” after “Regular Army”.Pub. L. 96–513section 531 of this title1958—Subsec. (b). struck out “except ” after “provision of law”.Pub. L. 85–861section 541 of this title

Effective Date of 1980 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–513section 701 of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this titleSept. 15, 1981

Degrees for Persons Who Graduated Before Accrediting of Military Academy, , provided in part that, under conditions prescribed by the Secretary of the Army, the Superintendent of the United States Military Academy may confer the degree of bachelor of science upon living graduates of the Academy who were graduated before the date of accrediting of the Academy and who have met the requirements of the Academy for that degree.Act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 3570A Stat. 634

Degrees for Persons Who Graduated Before Accrediting of Military Academy, , provided in part that, under conditions prescribed by the Secretary of the Army, the Superintendent of the United States Military Academy may confer the degree of bachelor of science upon living graduates of the Academy who were graduated before the date of accrediting of the Academy and who have met the requirements of the Academy for that degree.Act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 3570A Stat. 634

children.label: a
children.text: Under such conditions as the Secretary of the Army may prescribe, the Superintendent of the Academy may confer the degree of bachelor of science upon graduates of the Academy.

children.label: b
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, a cadet who completes the prescribed course of instruction may, upon graduation, be appointed a second lieutenant in the Regular Army under .section 531 of this title
